title: Chunk Randomizer
description:
Replaces all blocks of every chunk you visit!
Explore the randomizing world ...
... and defeat the ender dragon!
body: # Random Chunks **Every chunk you visit is randomized to a new blocktype!** **Explore the world..** **.. defeat the ender dragon.** **Important:** Run `/rc start` in chat to start the challenge. Chunk randomization only begins after this command. ## 🛠 Basic Commands | Command | Description | |:--------------------------|:-------------------------------------------------------------------------| | `/rc start` | Activate the challenge. | | `/rc stop` | Pause the challenge. | | `/rc effects` | **Toggle potion effects** (Default: false) | | `/rc fluids ` | **Toggle:** Should Water, Lava and Fire be randomized? (Default: false) | | `/rc exclude add ` | Add a block to the custom blacklist | | `/rc exclude clear` | Reset your custom blacklist | | `/rc debug <0-3>` | **Toggle** debug messages for protection, blocks, and effects. | ## 💡 Pro Tips & Customization - **Use /rc exclude add minecraft:...** to prevent a chunk from turning into a lag-fest. - **Chunk Walker Boots**: They protect you from all world-randomization and effects, but they lose 10 durability per chunk. - Status effects/curses are disabled by default. Enable or disable them using `/rc effects`. Active chunk effects are removed immediately when you leave the chunk, use Chunk Walker Boots, stop the challenge, or disable effects. Developed by Eckelsoft
